title: Chef Aid 5 Towel Clips
features: TEATOWEL CLIPS: These Clips help ensure you have you Teatowel to hand even when not in use as they can hang on the nearest clip
STRONG CLIP: The Clip produces a strong but not damaging grip on the cloth
COLOUR: Each Pack comes with different colours on the hanging loop
MULTI-USE: While designed for hanging Tea-Towels these clips can be used for hanging other items around the home
CHEF AID offers an extensive range of products for the Kitchen and Home that are affordable without compromising on quality
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality. A complete range of solutions for the home.
